title: Travizia
summary: Travel-themed social creatives designed to feel inviting, polished and easy to understand at a glance.
outcome: A social presence that felt inviting and calm — helping the brand build recognition around trust and destination clarity.

seo.title: Travizia — Travel Social Media Creatives | Shubham Pendse
seo.description: Travel-focused social creatives for Travizia, designed to feel inviting, polished and clear.

sections.heading: Overview
sections.body: Travizia's social creatives had to sell the feeling of travel, not just the offer. The work covered destination posts, package highlights and campaign moments.

sections.heading: Approach
sections.body: I built a system with generous imagery, quiet type and clear calls-to-action, so each post could stand alone and still feel like part of one brand voice.
